rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE JENNIFER Y. WONG REVOCABLE TRUST DATED 8/4/93 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Settlement
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The counsels report the court status of settlement. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Counsel or parties appearing in person must wear a mask covering their nose and mouth at all times while in the courthouse. Please review LRSF 14.1(D) for more information.

rulings.Rulings: Hearing. rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF RONALD LAMONTE BELL
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues may include: 1) Petitioner requests admission of a lost will 2) The tentative ruling for hearing on 9/21/22 advised that the Notice of Petition to Administer Estate (filed on 8/31/22 for the 9/21/22 hearing) contained the wrong remote appearance information; however, no further notice has been given, despite the matter being continued 4 times and 3 months passing. Remote appearances should be made whenever possible. Please review Local Rule 14.1. The following information pertains to appearances by Zoom: WHEN ENTERING "YOUR NAME" ON ZOOM, BOTH THE FIRST AND LAST NAME, AS WELL THE CASE NUMBER, MUST BE INCLUDED. Meeting ID: 160 225 4765 Password: 514879 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252, and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above.

rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Counsel to address the following issues: (1) electronic service with written consent under CRC 2.251 does not apply to Prob. Code Sec. 13655 (or 1220). (2) Attachment 7A not to include #5 as they are unidentified personal properties. If the petition wishes to include personal properties, they must be identifiable. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Counsel or parties appearing in person must wear a mask covering their nose and mouth at all times while in the courthouse. Please review LRSF 14.1(D) for more information.
